behavior_summary: This script manages a waterfall ambient sound tied to an in-game trigger region: when an actor enters the waterfall area the script marks/configures info state for that actor/area and starts a waterfall ambient SFX; when the actor leaves the area it mirrors the info/state changes and stops the previously started SFX.

U8P_WATRFALL::enterFastArea and leaveFastArea form an enter/exit pair for a fast-area trigger: both call engine operations to set an info key and exclude/process state for a referenced object and then call an audio routine to start/stop the waterfall sound instance identified by a constant channel/id.
No global game-state flags are read or written by this excerpt; behavior is local to the triggering entity/area and the ambient sound channel.
notable_control_flow: Engine invokes U8P_WATRFALL::enterFastArea when an actor enters the fast-area trigger; it first performs set-info and process-exclude operations and then calls playAmbientSFX to begin the waterfall sound.
Engine invokes U8P_WATRFALL::leaveFastArea when an actor leaves the fast-area trigger; it performs analogous set-info/process-exclude operations and calls stopSFX to end the waterfall sound.
The enter handler pushes an extra byte parameter (0x32) when starting sound that is not present on stop, implying a start-only playback parameter (volume/priority/etc.).
open_questions: Precise meaning of the constants 0x021B and 0x021C used with 'set info' (appear to be enter/exit info keys but exact semantics unknown).
Exact interpretation of the 2-byte indirect value (indirect 02h bytes) — likely an info/resource pointer or position id associated with the waterfall but not definitively identified.
Exact role of the byte 0x32 passed to playAmbientSFX (likely volume/priority/playback flag) and the 0x00CA value used as the sound channel/instance id — both inferred from call patterns.
Whether the SFX is tracked per-entity or per-location (script appears to tie the sound to the triggering entity and the indirect 2-byte value but implementation detail is inferred).

main_function.name: U8P_WATRFALL::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: Handle an actor entering the waterfall trigger region: set area/object info and exclusion state for the referenced entity/area and start the waterfall ambient sound tied to that entity/position/channel.
entry_conditions: Event F: actor (Avatar or other) enters the waterfall fast-area trigger region (engine dispatch to U8P_WATRFALL::enterFastArea).

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Enter-area handler that configures info/exclusion and starts waterfall ambient SFX.

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Leave-area handler that configures info/exclusion and stops the waterfall ambient SFX.

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::playAmbientSFX
function_map.role: Engine/audio routine used to start an ambient sound instance (waterfall) tied to an entity/position and playback parameters.

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::stopSFX
function_map.role: Engine/audio routine used to stop the ambient sound instance/channel previously started for the waterfall.

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::set info
function_map.role: Engine operation used to set a named info/state key (e.g., 0x021B/0x021C) on a referenced object.

function_map.name: U8P_WATRFALL::process exclude
function_map.role: Engine operation used to mark an object as excluded from normal processing (used here after setting info).

external_calls.purpose: Set an info/state key (constant 0x021B) on a referenced object/area to record enter-state or other metadata.
Mark the referenced object/area as excluded from normal processing after setting the info key (common engine pattern).
Start the waterfall ambient sound for the triggering entity/position using parameters (entity, indirect-pointer, playback byte 0x32, channel/id 0x00CA).
Set an info/state key (constant 0x021C) on the referenced object/area to record exit-state or other metadata.
Mark the referenced object/area as excluded from normal processing after setting the exit info key.
Stop the waterfall ambient sound previously started (uses entity/indirect-pointer and channel/id 0x00CA to identify which sound to stop).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script manages a waterfall ambient sound tied to an in-game trigger region: when an actor enters the waterfall area the script marks/configures info state for that actor/area and starts a waterfall ambient SFX; when the actor leaves the area it mirrors the info/state changes and stops the previously started SFX.
